title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform that enables AI agents to build, deploy, host, and run software in a real Ubuntu environment with database, storage, terminal, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment capabilities. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live software deployment for autonomous agents.
